DocumentationExampleCode.Code: meta-cli new-workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --application app-my-cli --standard-cli-shapes --default-help meta-cli add-command --workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --id cmd-show --application app-my-cli --name show --token show --description "Show the workspace." meta-cli add-executable-command --workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --id exec-show --command cmd-show meta-cli add-option --workspace .\my-cli.MetaCli --parameter-id param-show-workspace --option-id option-show-workspace --executable-command exec-show --name workspace --value-shape shape-path --token-id token-show-workspace --token --workspace --description "Workspace path."
meta-convert schema-to-raw-datavault --source-workspace .\SourceSchema.Workspace --new-workspace .\RawVault.Workspace

meta-data-quality from-transform-workspace --transform-workspace .\Transforms.Workspace --binding-workspace .\Binding.Workspace --new-workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace meta-data-quality inspect --workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace meta-data-quality promote --workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace --all meta-convert data-quality-to-sql --workspace .\DataQuality.Workspace --out .\DataQuality.sql
cd MetaDocs\Docs\SuiteWorkspace meta-docs browse meta-docs browse cli/meta-docs meta-docs browse model/MetaDocs meta-docs search deploy
meta-docs import-cli --workspace MetaDocs\Docs\Workspaces\meta-docs-cli --source-workspace MetaDocs\Cli\meta-docs.MetaCli --parent-subject public:meta:cli
meta-docs render-site --workspace MetaDocs\Docs\SuiteWorkspace --out MetaDocs\Docs\Site
@' render-site --workspace ..\SuiteWorkspace --out ..\Site '@ | meta-mesh add-step --operation regenerate-public-docs --name render-site --executable meta-docs --arguments-stdin --working-directory .
cd MetaDocs\Docs\Documentation.MetaMesh meta-mesh validate --operation regenerate-public-docs meta-mesh run --operation regenerate-public-docs

meta-orchestration infer --pipeline-workspace .\Pipeline.Workspace --new-workspace .\Orchestration.Workspace meta-orchestration list-issues --workspace .\Orchestration.Workspace meta-orchestration refresh-run-plan --workspace .\Orchestration.Workspace meta-orchestration inspect-run-plan --workspace .\Orchestration.Workspace
meta-pipeline new-workspace .\Pipeline.Workspace meta-pipeline add-pipeline --workspace .\Pipeline.Workspace --name CustomerLoad
meta-schema extract sqlserver --new-workspace .\SourceSchema.Workspace --connection-env META_SOURCE_SQL --system SourceWarehouse --schema dbo --all-tables
meta-sql deploy --source-workspace .\MetaSql.Workspace --manifest-workspace .\DeployPlan.Workspace --connection-env META_TARGET_SQL

meta-transform-binding bind --transform-workspace .\Transforms.Workspace --source-schema .\SourceSchema.Workspace --target-schema .\WarehouseSchema.Workspace --execute-system SourceWarehouse --execute-system-default-schema-name dbo --new-workspace .\Binding.Workspace

meta-transform-script from sql-file --path .\views\v_customer.sql --new-workspace .\Transforms.Workspace --target dbo.v_customer meta-transform-script to sql-path --workspace .\Transforms.Workspace --out .\RoundTrippedSql

meta-weave new-workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace meta-weave add-model --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --alias Source --model SourceModel --workspace-path .\Source.Workspace meta-weave add-model --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --alias Target --model TargetModel --workspace-path .\Target.Workspace meta-weave add-binding --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --name CustomerName --source-model Source --source-entity Customer --source-property Name --target-model Target --target-entity Customer --target-property CustomerName meta-weave check --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace meta-weave materialize --workspace .\MetaWeave.Workspace --model TargetModel --new-workspace .\Materialized.Workspace

DocumentationExampleCode.Title: Dependency-free consumer usage
Workspace-backed tooling usage

DocumentationExampleCode.Code: meta generate csharp --workspace .\Workspace --out .\out\csharp --tooling
meta generate sql --workspace .\Workspace --out .\out\sql
meta instance diff .\BaselineWorkspace .\FeatureWorkspace meta instance merge .\IntegrationWorkspace .\FeatureWorkspace.instance-diff

meta import csv .\demo-csv\products.csv --entity Product --new-workspace .\Workspace meta import csv ..\demo-csv\suppliers.csv --entity Supplier meta import csv ..\demo-csv\categories.csv --entity Category meta import csv ..\demo-csv\warehouses.csv --entity Warehouse meta import csv ..\demo-csv\orders.csv --entity Order meta model suggest --print-commands meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.ProductId --target Product --lookup Id meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.SupplierId --target Supplier --lookup Id meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id

meta init .\Workspace cd .\Workspace meta model rename-model MetadataModel WorkspaceCatalog meta model add-entity System meta model add-property System SystemName --required true meta insert System 1 --set "SystemName=Enterprise Analytics Platform" meta status meta generate sql --out ..\out\sql meta generate csharp --out ..\out\csharp --tooling

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <EnterpriseBIPlatform> <CubeList> <Cube Id="1"> <CubeName>Sales Performance</CubeName> <Purpose>Monthly revenue and margin tracking.</Purpose> <RefreshMode>Scheduled</RefreshMode> </Cube> </CubeList>
<MeasureList> <Measure Id="1" CubeId="1"> <MeasureName>Sales Amount</MeasureName> <MDX>[Measures].[Sales Amount]</MDX> </Measure> </MeasureList>
<SystemTypeList> <SystemType Id="1"> <TypeName>Internal</TypeName> </SystemType> </SystemTypeList>
<SystemList> <System Id="1" SystemTypeId="1"> <SystemName>Enterprise Analytics Platform</SystemName> <Version>2.1</Version> </System> </SystemList>
<SystemCubeList> <SystemCube Id="1" CubeId="1" SystemId="1"> <ProcessingMode>InMemory</ProcessingMode> </SystemCube> </SystemCubeList> </EnterpriseBIPlatform>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Model name="EnterpriseBIPlatform"> <EntityList> <Entity name="Cube"> <PropertyList> <Property name="CubeName" /> <Property name="Purpose" isRequired="false" /> <Property name="RefreshMode" isRequired="false" /> </PropertyList> </Entity>
<Entity name="Measure"> <PropertyList> <Property name="MeasureName" /> <Property name="MDX" isRequired="false" /> </PropertyList> <RelationshipList> <Relationship entity="Cube" /> </RelationshipList> </Entity>
<Entity name="SystemType"> <PropertyList> <Property name="TypeName" /> </PropertyList> </Entity>
<Entity name="System"> <PropertyList> <Property name="SystemName" /> <Property name="Version" isRequired="false" /> </PropertyList> <RelationshipList> <Relationship entity="SystemType" /> </RelationshipList> </Entity>
<Entity name="SystemCube"> <PropertyList> <Property name="ProcessingMode" isRequired="false" /> </PropertyList> <RelationshipList> <Relationship entity="Cube" /> <Relationship entity="System" /> </RelationshipList> </Entity> </EntityList> </Model>
